title: No Gizmo
description: Removes the gizmo from the Debug (F3) screen.
body:
# No Gizmo

**Simply removes the gizmo from the Debug (F3) screen. No more annoying axis thingy!**

Updated for 1.18+

[Original](https://modrinth.com/mod/nogizmo)ly created by [sammko](https://modrinth.com/user/sammko)
